title: CYP3A4 Metabolic Clearance Acceleration
description: Neem leaf extracts induce hepatic CYP3A4 enzymes, accelerating the systemic clearance of Lumefantrine and reducing active antimalarial plasma concentrations.
clinicalAdvice: Avoid concurrent use. Allow ACT tablets to complete their full 3-day course before resuming Neem-based therapeutic teas.
